character page


"you don't want to have to slog through the slowburn to fuck the alien, do you? you just want to be like "oh mr veks i dont know if it'll fit 🥺" i know you. you thought those sinful thoughts were between you and god but guess what? he's not here, but i am. and i know that you skimmed through the lore to get to the good stuff because who gives a shit about the imperium when this scaly bad boy is seven foot two? you dont want to find his son you just want to know if he uses one pene or two and if they can fit in the same hole or not. i'd say you disgust me but we're not so different, you and i. you think i do all this lore writing bullshit out of a desire to create a rich world full of complex, dynamic characters to engage in thrilling stories of adventure and intrigue? no. i do it so i can fuck a giant snake alien security officer in zero g"
